metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by khang — skills for implementation, design, optimization, and more

plugins.name: proposal
plugins.description: Deterministic feature implementation workflow with state-tracked checkpoints, mandatory agent delegation, and completion audit.

plugins.name: design-prompt
plugins.description: Interactive web design prompt builder with 63+ inspiration themes across nature, urban, art, cinema, mood, era, and material categories.

plugins.name: skill-optimizer
plugins.description: Autoresearch-pattern skill improvement loop. Analyzes any skill, creates criteria interactively, runs evaluate-improve-keep/revert cycles via claude CLI.

plugins.name: llm-router
plugins.description: Unified LLM gateway for multi-model routing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter.

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: Research, analyze, and create comprehensive implementation plans with red-team validation.

plugins.name: outline-cli
plugins.description: Search, read, and update company documentation in Outline wiki.

plugins.name: jira-mcp
plugins.description: Jira integration via MCP — search issues, create tickets, manage sprints with JQL.

plugins.name: codex-cli
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex CLI integration — auth, providers, config, and operations.

plugins.name: fix-codex-skill
plugins.description: Repair malformed Codex CLI skill files — format validation and auto-fix.

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Context engineering guardrails enforcing hierarchical orchestrator-worker agent spawning, small-job-per-session limits, independent validator agents, CRISPY workflow, and vertical planning.
